sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110556" key="feremmeli/hs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φερεμμελίης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Φερεμελίας,</foreign> <sense id="n110556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spear-bearing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φώς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0255.tlg001:14:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mimn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
